title: uragoga constricta
side_effects: Uragoga constricta can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to more severe complications, including kidney damage, respiratory failure, and even death. Additionally, the plant's active ingredients may interact negatively with certain medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions or causing unpredictable reactions. In some cases, improper use of uragoga constricta has been linked to seizures, hallucinations, and altered mental states.
